name: gemini
description: Delegate reasoning, code review, and research to Google Gemini from your coding agent — billed to your Google AI Pro / Ultra subscription via the Antigravity CLI (agy), not your agent's tokens. Skills: gemini-pro (general delegation + model selection via -m), gemini-review (adversarial code/diff/plan review), gemini-research (structured digestion of large context). Triggers: 'use Gemini', 'ask Gemini Pro', 'let Gemini review this', 'юзай Gemini'.
